description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named continuous-integration that runs nightly at 2am and on every push to main and tags, as well as on every pull request. The workflow has three jobs: windows2019, windows2022, and windows2022_perf, each running on a different Windows environment. Each job checks out the code, installs Doxygen, Python 3.10, numpy, and SWIG, caches dependencies, builds and tests opensim-core, and uploads the resulting artifact.
